Est. 2011 · Ajax, Ontario About Our Mandir

A Sacred Space
For Our Community

Sankat Mochan Hanuman Mandir & Cultural Centre was founded in 2011 by a group of devoted families with roots in the Caribbean and South Asian Hindu tradition. What began as a gathering of faith has grown into a vibrant spiritual home for the entire Durham Region.

Under the divine guidance of Head Pandit Pt. Rabindranath Tiwari, our mandir celebrates the full richness of Sanatan Dharma — from daily aartis and Hanuman Chalisa to elaborate five-day Kathas, Navratri celebrations, and life's sacred milestones.

🙏
Daily Puja

Morning & evening aartis, Hanuman Chalisa and prayers performed with full vidhi.

🎓
Cultural Education

Preserving our traditions for the next generation through katha, kirtan and cultural programs.

📺
Live Streaming

Every puja broadcast live on YouTube so devotees worldwide can join in darshan.

🤝
Community Seva

100% volunteer-run. Every dollar donated goes directly to temple operations and seva.

Our Deities

Hanuman Ji

Embodiment of devotion, strength, courage and selfless service.

Shiv Ji

Lord of transformation, meditation and inner peace.

Radha Krishna

Divine symbols of eternal love, compassion and devotion.

Satyanarayan Ji

Manifestation of Lord Vishnu representing truth, prosperity and blessings.

Durga Maa

Divine mother and protector who destroys evil and grants strength.

Durga Maa

Radiant form of Shakti representing courage, protection and victory.

01
Jun

Ekadashi Puja

Fasting day observance with special Vishnu puja and kirtan.

Monthly
15
Jun

Satyanarayan Katha

Monthly Satyanarayan Katha — all devotees welcome. Prasad to follow.

Open to All
20
Jun

Nirjala Ekadashi

Special fast with extended katha. One of the most auspicious Ekadashis of the year.

Special
Jul
2025

Annual Hanuman Jayanti

Grand celebration of Hanuman Ji's birth — abhishek, bhajan sandhya and mahaprasad.

Seva & Giving

Support Our
Temple Seva

Every contribution — no matter the size — is a direct act of seva to Hanuman Ji and to our entire sangat. Your generosity keeps this mandir alive, accessible, and growing.

🔴
Tuesday Hanuman Ji Mala

Sponsor the weekly Tuesday mala

$40 / week
🌸
Ekadashi Shringar

Sponsor a special deity dressing

$50 / occasion
🍽️
Priti Bhoj

Sponsor a community meal after puja

By arrangement
🏛️
General Mandir Fund

Support operations, upkeep & growth

Any amount

SMHM IS A REGISTERED NON-PROFIT

Sankat Mochan Hanuman Mandir & Cultural Centre Inc. is a registered non-profit organization. All donations support temple operations directly.

YouTube Live

Watch Our
Pujas Live

Whether you're in Ajax or across the world, you can join every puja, aarti and katha live on our YouTube channel. Our dedicated streaming setup brings you crystal-clear HD video from multiple cameras.

📹
Multi-Camera HD

PTZ camera, iPhone 16 Pro Max & JVC HD Cam — full temple coverage.

🔴
Live Every Week

Tuesday evenings, Sunday mornings, and all major puja days — streamed live.

📚
Full Archive

All past kathas, bhajans and special events saved and searchable on our channel.
